title: wirelint: executable cross-repo enforcement of GraphQL wire-name SSOT (constraint C-006)
examples: wirelint loads every wire_name from ir/domain/*.ir.json (kind=query), then scans the target tree for quoted literal occurrences. Hits outside generated-client paths (backend/internal/contracts/, frontend/lib/contracts_client/) fail CI. C-006 was constraint-level until now; D008 makes it executable.

backend contracts-drift.yml clones contracts, builds wirelint, runs: wirelint --root backend --exclude internal/contracts. A hand-typed literal of any GraphQL wire identifier outside internal/contracts/ would fail. Same pattern for frontend with --exclude lib/contracts_client.

Generated-file detection: any file whose first 5 lines contain the substring 'Code generated' is skipped (gen-go-client and gen-dart-client emit this header). Binary extensions (.png, .pdf, .ico, etc.), .git/, bin/, vendor/, node_modules/, .dart_tool/, build/ are also skipped.
Empty IR (no kind=query docs) → wirelint exits OK without scanning. Bootstrap repos remain green until the first query is added to DSL.
